name: Beka
description_short: Beka is a family-owned woodcraft manufacturer in St. Paul, Minnesota, specializing in handmade wooden toys, looms, and furniture since 1973. This is NOT a consumer finance company.
description_long:
Beka, Inc. is a specialty wood products manufacturer founded in 1973 and operated as a family business in St. Paul, Minnesota. The company was established by the Kreisman family and is now in its second generation of ownership, with founder Jamie Kreisman joined by his son Jonathon. Originally focused on hand weaving looms sold through specialty yarn stores, the company expanded into creative play products for children after the founders started having families of their own.

Beka manufactures and sells a range of USA-made wooden products including building block sets, weaving looms, tapestry looms, rigid heddle looms, wooden easels, puppet theaters, play tables, train tables, storage carts, stilts, ring toss games, and lemonade stands. All products are handcrafted in their Minnesota woodshop and marketed as 100% USA made. The company operates an e-commerce website where customers can purchase products directly, and they accept custom orders for retailers and bulk buyers.

The company distinguishes itself through its commitment to domestic manufacturing, longevity (50+ years in operation), family ownership across generations, and emphasis on eco-friendly materials and locally-made production. Products are described as designed to "spark creativity and imagination," and the company highlights safety awards and educational value. They offer free shipping, expedited shipping options, and provide assembly instructions for products.

This is fundamentally a retail toy and furniture manufacturer, not a consumer finance company. Beka provides no lending products, credit services, financial products, or payday alternatives. The current categorization as "payday-alternatives" is a complete miscategorization that must be corrected.
services: Rigid heddle looms for fiber arts
Wooden easels for art and play
pros: 100% USA manufactured products with transparent domestic production

Eco-friendly materials and hard maple construction highlighted
Accepts custom orders for retailers and businesses
Offers expedited shipping options upon request
cons: Not a consumer finance company—miscategorization suggests database error
Website provides no pricing information accessible without adding items to cart
Limited customer service channels (phone and contact form only; no chat, email listed)
No reviews, ratings, or third-party verification accessible on website
best_for: Parents seeking educational, durable wooden toys made domestically
Retailers and toy stores sourcing USA-made inventory
Customers valuing eco-friendly, locally-manufactured children's products
diagnosis: Beka is a woodcraft and toy manufacturer with no connection to consumer finance, lending, credit, or payday alternatives. This company should not be in the CreditDoc database and requires immediate recategorization or removal. The current category assignment appears to be a data entry error.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
